events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: copper-to-steel transition with no dielectric union. This is a galvanic corrosion risk and code non-compliance. IPC requires dielectric fittings at dissimilar metal transitions. This is a fail.

"Copper-to-steel pipe transition made without a dielectric union or approved dielectric fitting",
"Dissimilar-metal contact will drive galvanic corrosion and premature failure of the steel side",
"Non-compliant with IPC requirements for dielectric separation at copper-to-steel transitions"
],
"actions": [
"Cut out the direct copper-to-steel joint and install a listed dielectric union or dielectric nipple/fitting",
"Verify dielectric fitting is listed and rated for the system pressure/temperature",
"Re-inspect transition after correction before close-out"
],
"rationale": "A direct copper-to-steel connection lacks the required dielectric separation, creating galvanic corrosion and violating IPC provisions for dissimilar-metal transitions. At rough-complete this is an installed defective, non-compliant condition requiring rework before close-out.",
